stories.title: Blame Pochettino if you want, but these USMNT play...
stories.summary: U.S. fans expected more out of the USMNT's expensive, famous coach at the World Cup, but there was one problem: the players.

stories.title: Pay-to-play youth soccer explains America's World ...
stories.summary: Focus is more on parents' ability to pay for travel matches than on young player development.

stories.title: Yankees make history, strike out 17 times again
stories.summary: In a 6-4 loss to the Rays on Tuesday night, the Yankees whiffed 17 times to become the first team in American League history to hit that mark in consecutive nine-inning games.

stories.title: Sources: Grizz land Post after Dubs don't match
stories.summary: The Warriors will not match the three-year, $30 million offer sheet for reserve center Quinten Post, allowing the restricted free agent to join the Grizzlies.

stories.title: Royals' Tolbert (12 ABs, 12 hits) ties MLB record
stories.summary: Tyler Tolbert of the Royals tied a major league record with hits in 12 consecutive plate appearances, reaching the mark with an infield single in a 16-12 win over the Mets on Tuesday night.
